queries.question: List unlimited all you can eat license from cuad_contract where document name is one of AGENCY AGREEMENT, STRATEGIC ALLIANCE AGREEMENT, FRANCHISE AGREEMENT, COLLABORATION AGREEMENT, and 12 more.
queries.sql: SELECT "unlimited_all_you_can_eat_license" FROM "cuad_contract" WHERE "document_name" IN ('AGENCY AGREEMENT', 'STRATEGIC ALLIANCE AGREEMENT', 'FRANCHISE AGREEMENT', 'COLLABORATION AGREEMENT', 'SPONSORSHIP AGREEMENT', 'CO-BRANDING AGREEMENT', 'INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY AGREEMENT', 'PROMOTION AGREEMENT', 'DISTRIBUTOR AGREEMENT', 'SUPPLY AGREEMENT', 'Collaboration Agreement', 'LICENSE, DEVELOPMENT AND COMMERCIALIZATION AGREEMENT', 'ENDORSEMENT AGREEMENT', 'Outsourcing Base Agreement', 'Strategic Alliance Agreement', 'Supply Agreement');
